turns.text: Of course! We have some pastries and sandwiches. Do you have something specific in mind, or would you like a suggestion?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, actually, I'm waiting for a friend, so can I get another coffee and another sandwich?”

turns.speaker: bot

turns.speaker: learner

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “That sounds fantastic. Thank you so much.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hey, my friend arrived already and he actually told me that he doesn't want the Regular coffee with oat milk. Can I get a flat white instead that?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! I'll switch that to a flat white for your friend. No problem at all! Let me know if there's anything else you need.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, I'm gonna pay for the extra coffee as well, but can you explain to me what's the difference between a flat white or latte or Any other coffee drink because for me sounds the same”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, I'd be happy to explain! A flat white has a strong coffee flavor with a velvety microfoam milk, and it's typically smaller in volume. A latte, on the other hand, has more milk and is creamier and a bit milder in flavor. So it really comes down to the strength of the coffee and the milk texture. Hope that helps!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And actually as well, my friend is vegan. I didn't know it. Do you have any vegan option for him?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, we can definitely make that flat white with a plant-based milk like oat milk or almond milk. So no worries at all! I'll make sure it's vegan-friendly.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What about something for eating?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure thing! We have a variety of vegan snacks as well, like fruit and nut bars or a vegan sandwich option. Just let me know what you'd prefer, and I'll add that in for you!

turns.text: “아마도 비건 샌드위치?”

turns.speaker: learner

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, exactly! The main difference is the flour used. Gluten-free pastries typically use alternative flours like almond flour, rice flour, or a blend of gluten-free flours. They have a slightly different texture, but they're just as delicious!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Also in school, thank you, because my mom is pretty picky.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I totally understand! We'll make sure she has something she'll love. Just let me know if you have any other preferences, and I'll take care of everything for your visit tomorrow!

turns.text: “Yeah, for example, for example, what options do you have for my father who's dairy free?”

turns.text: We have plenty of dairy-free options as well! We can use plant-based milks for any coffee drinks, and we also have dairy-free desserts and snacks, like coconut milk-based pastries. So your dad will definitely be covered as well!

turns.speaker: learner

turns.text: “では、ビーンズについて、一つの原理か、混合的な原理なのかを説明します。”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great question! We actually use a blend of beans to get a balanced flavor, but we do have single-origin options sometimes as well. If you're interested in a specific type, just let me know!

turns.text: Oh, I love that! We do have some Australian-roasted coffee options, so they’ll definitely feel at home with that. I'll make sure their coffee is up to their standards!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, sounds good. Did you roast your beans in-house or what exactly? Can you explain to me, please?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! We do roast our beans in-house, so we have full control over the freshness and the flavor profile. That way, we can ensure the best quality for every cup!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Honestly, it sounds pretty interesting. I'm interested in trying something new. Any recommendations for me?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I'd love to help with that! If you're in the mood for something a bit adventurous, I can recommend our signature house blend, or maybe a single-origin coffee with a unique flavor profile. Just let me know what you're in the mood for!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, for example, can you explain to me what's cold brew?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! Cold brew is made by steeping coffee grounds in cold water for an extended period, usually about 12 to 24 hours. It results in a smoother, less acidic coffee that's really refreshing. It’s definitely a fun one to try!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Colborough is the same as Long Island.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: They do have some similarities in that they're both cold coffee beverages, but cold brew is a specific brewing method, whereas a Long Island is actually a cocktail. So definitely different things, but both are tasty in their own way!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I thought actually Long Island is just ice, a little quantity of water, and coffee”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I can see how it might seem similar in that it's cold and refreshing! Cold brew is definitely a smooth, flavorful coffee, while a Long Island is more of a mixed drink. But it’s always fun to explore different coffee and drink options!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Cool, cool. Thank you. Appreciate your help.”
